JEANINE K. CLASEN,ESQ. 916/565-0300 FOR X-DEFENDANT-MP(SHOWED-UP IN COURT LATE)

RULING; INITIALY,THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING.SUSTAIN-WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. BUT, COUNSEL FOR MOVING PARTY (X-DEFENDANT) MS.J.CLASEN SHOWED-UP LATE IN COURT AFTER IT WAS CALLED AND HEARD.THE COURT ADVISED HER TO CALL THE OPPOSING COUNSEL IF IT'S OKAY FOR HER TO ARGUE EX-PARTE. MOMENTS LATER SHE CAME BACK,INFORMING THE COURT, THAT AS AN OFFICER OF THE COURT, SHE REPRESENTS, THAT SHE TALKED TO THE OPPOSING COUNSEL. HENCE, THE COURT ALLOWED HER TO ARGUE EX-PARTY.AFTER HEARING HER VIEWS ON THE MATTER, THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. (302/JUDGE MC CARTHY/JU-JT)MITCH LYON #6840
